Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing expert Jim Crowley teaches us how to design and build our own rigs for every freshwater species.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin takes viewers to the top destinations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Stoked on Fishing crew takes you to the most amazing locations for some epic saltwater action.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim Crowley interviews top anglers and industry insiders from around the world of angling.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows the effectiveness of swim jigs for both largemouth and smallmouth bass in extremely clear water
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Swim Jiggin' It
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al Lindner and Jeff Klozinski spend the day tracking down postspawn smallmouth.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Finding Transitional Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank is headed to SC to spend a day with some of his favorites young pals at The Boy's Farm in Newberry. Hank & the boys target stripers on beautiful Lake Murray.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Fishing for stripers on Lake Murray
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Kids with life-threatenting illnesses are in need of help & hope. Today Hank shares his boat with Outdoor Dream Foundation.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Making dreams a reality
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank shares the water with some youth bass anglers. He teaches the anglers how to read and fish new water.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker goes after the fish on Lake Monticello with friend Bobby Williams.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker spends a day catching fish with well-known Christian author Dennis Rainey.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing - Grosse Savanne Bass Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank and close friend/business partner, Keith Kelly return to Hank's premiere signature lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Big Bass at Rockhouse Farms
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fom South Carolina to Texas, today's show covers 1,500 miles of bass fishing & baseball fun. Hank's grandson pitcher, Alec takes a break from sports camp to join "pawpaw."
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank sets out with two next-generation fishermen... high schoolers with a hunger for the outdoors. He shares his tricks of the trade as he & his young friends land some big bass using a variety baits.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker spends a day on Lake Hartwell chasing after the fish and sharing his boat with Outdoor Dream Foundation friends.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Season 8 Episode 3 kicks off our first open-water shoot of the year as Paul Ethier and Jeff Shippam make their way to the legendary Mattagami Lake for some classic spring walleye action. With competitive tournaments on pause this season, the guys revisit their favourite early-season hotspots—areas they’d normally fish under pressure—now with time to explore, adapt, and enjoy the day. From structure-hopping to dialing in the spring pattern, Paul and Jeff put their tournament instincts to work for a fun, relaxed day chasing hungry post-spawn walleye in Northern Ontario.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake

Image.alt: FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake
FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake
FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake

Video.summary: In the thrilling Season 7 finale, Paul & Perry and the team venture deep into Northern Ontario, using a Polaris Ranger to access a remote lake with high hopes for walleye. However, the day takes a surprising turn as Northern Pike steal the show with their spirited action. The adventure doesn’t end there—a bonus portage into another lake offers a chance to explore uncharted waters. It’s a fitting conclusion to a season filled with the unexpected and unforgettable.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Remote Escapes: Pike Frenzy and Hidden Lake Explorations
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In Episode 3, we navigate the serene waters of the Ivanhoe River, embracing the beauty of spring as we target post-spawn walleye. With rods in hand, we explore the river's productive fishing spots, uncovering the best techniques and tips for a successful catch in this transitional season. From scenic backdrops to thrilling strikes, this episode captures the essence of spring fishing at its finest.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Spring on the Ivanhoe: Post-Spawn Walleye Adventures
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fly in with us to Blackbirch Lake with Gray Wood Outfitter for some non stop action
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James Lindner and Jake Wallace use Humminbird Mega LIVE to pinpoint and dropshot up some Minnesota gold.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Mega LIVE Dropshot Walleyes
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Lake Chatuge's spotted bass are schooling throughout the open water and Kim capitalizes on the rising fish with a Strike King "Sexy Dawg". When the surface activity slows, he switches to a small Rage Swimmer swimbait to better match the forage size.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Seaguar Assistant Marketing Manager, Brian Evans acquires a lesson in light refraction while sight fishing the smallie-rich flats of Lake St. Clair. Kim provides some guidence from the lake bottoms while conversing with Brian topside.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Look at that Fish!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Spring walleye fishing on Kenogamissi Lake. A friendly husband vs wives challenge.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Crappie or Bust
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Crappie or Bust
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On 9/11/2001, Bryan Anderson started basic training with the U.S. Army. A few months later he would find himself in the middle of the Iraq War as a military police officer. An IED Explosion would change his life forever, and Bryan would begin his new life as a triple amputee.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Army Veteran Bryan Anderson
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In 1966, a 19-year-old, Wisconsin farm boy's life changed forever when he was drafted into the Army and shipped over to Vietnam. Now a soldier, Glenn engaged in numerous battles, and scouted for the infamous "tunnel rats" in the Vietnam War. The lone survivor in his platoon, the most heart-breaking s
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Vietnam Veteran Glenn Franks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dan Merchant shows Jarrett just how effective fishing sea walls can be at Canyon Lake California
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Smallmouth bass, particularly those that are positioned shallow, are susceptible to a topwater lure. Yet, anglers need to realize as conditions change, so should your lure choice.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Watch U.S. Army vet Danny Barrett as he recounts his life of service in the military.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This week, we're on the road again, headed to the Mississippi to see our friend Adam Christianson to catch some perch! With the ice coming in slow this year it's time to hop on the airboat for a fun ride!
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | Airboat Perch Fishing

Image.alt: Larry Smith Outdoors | Airboat Perch Fishing
Larry Smith Outdoors | Airboat Perch Fishing
Larry Smith Outdoors | Airboat Perch Fishing

Video.summary: Larry delivers loads of tips and tricks on catching walleye.
Video.title: Walleye Slam 2022

Video.summary: Over the last few weeks, Shea McIntee and the crew have been hanging out in Gustavus, Alaska, the southern gateway to Glacier Bay National Park. Mother Nature has blessed us with lovely weather that has allowed us to observe its incredible surroundings, animals, and whales. Halibut fishing has been off the charts, especially using jigs in shallow water. Today, we saved the best for last and get into one big halibut after another. Stoked on Alaska. Here we go!
Video.title: Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 4

Image.alt: Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 4
Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 4
Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 4

Video.summary: Dustin uses cool new bait to help catch finicky bass
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | New Spin on Finesse
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim explains how to build one of the most effective baits for bass.
Video.title: Episode 1
